commandsRun.command: rg -n "Mission status|Agent:|Status:|Current code differences:|Todo:|Fully implemented:" docs/product/tracking.md docs/research/toggl-timer-top-entry-form.md docs/research/toggl-timer-view-family.md
commandsRun.observation: Each directly used timer-core source doc showed exactly one active Mission status block with all canonical fields present. All three blocks report `Status: complete`, `Todo: none`, and `Fully implemented: yes`.

assertions.reason: The closed timer-core source docs inspected for this milestone each contain exactly one active mission status block in the source file itself.
Each inspected status block includes the canonical `Agent`, `Status`, `Current code differences`, `Todo`, and `Fully implemented` fields.
The inspected blocks are internally consistent: each reports no remaining differences, `Todo: none`, and `Fully implemented: yes`, matching the verified timer-core implementation state.

frictions.description: The full mission closed-doc set contains more docs than the timer-core implementation features directly used.
frictions.resolution: Scoped traceability validation to the directly used timer-core source docs evidenced by the completed milestone features and current mission status blocks.

summary: Documentation traceability checks passed for the timer-core source docs directly used by the completed milestone features.
